ddls:
CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the resident */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residency program the resident is enrolled in */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty the resident is pursuing */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the resident started the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the resident is expected to complete the program */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the resident */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "medical_school" TEXT /* Name of the medical school the resident attended */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the resident graduated from medical school */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the resident */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the resident is licensed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residency program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the residency program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution hosting the program */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the program is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the program is located */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the residency program */,
  "program_director" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  "program_coordinator" TEXT /* Name of the program coordinator */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the program */,
  "secondary_contact_email" TEXT /* Secondary contact email for the program */,
  "program_accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* Website of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the institution */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "specialty_code" TEXT /* Code for the specialty */,
  "subspecialties" TEXT /* List of subspecialties within the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resident_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident */,
  "rotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the rotation the resident is completing */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the rotation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the rotation ended */,
  "rotation_type" TEXT /* Type of rotation */,
  "rotation_description" TEXT /* Description of the rotation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score given to the resident for the rotation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given to the resident for the rotation */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the rotation is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resident_progress_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rotation_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* ID of the progress record */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score given by the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rotation_evaluations_progress_id FOREIGN KEY ("progress_id") REFERENCES resident_progress ("progress_id")
)
